card_description: The Romans is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick clarifies his "3-element schema" (God, the Artifact, and Man) to explain the hostility of the world and Christ's suffering."

linked_segments.summary: Dick clarifies his "3-element schema" (God, the Artifact, and Man) to explain the hostility of the world and Christ's suffering. He argues that the artifact's world has turned "feral" even to its crea
